codeReview.summary: Cleanup implementation aligns with requested scope: legacy inline password-reset fields/path removed in favor of PasswordResetToken flow, support ticket requester lookup and admin last-login enrichment were batch optimized, reports-vs-inventory InventoryValuationService bean collision resolved, duplicate helper paths were reduced, and gate-fast/compile validations passed after targeted regression repairs.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Backend-worker skill currently mandates strict TDD wording for all tasks, but CI/script/documentation-heavy and code-cleanup tasks in this mission repeatedly required a validation-first approach rather than adding failing unit tests first.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Feature handoff for dead-code-and-duplicate-cleanup followed regression/gate validation and repair workflow; similar deviation pattern appears in other non-feature-code tasks (e.g., ci-pipeline-verification handoff skillFeedback).

summary: PASS. Dead-code cleanup changes are coherent, regressions were handled, and verification evidence supports VAL-CLEAN-001 coverage without new blocking defects.
